markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss integration of HubSpot lead data into Looker reports for GrowthX clients (Tiro and Webstacks)](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot data will be exported to a Google Sheet, which Looker can then access for reporting](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Manual tagging of GrowthX-produced content will be required, but can be aided by VLOOKUP formulas](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Additional visualizations requested: monthly view option and content distribution across cohorts](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Vivek will address the bar chart limitation and explore adding monthly data views](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Integration Process

  - [Clients (Tiro and Webstacks) to export HubSpot data to a Google Sheet in the Teams folder](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Sheet to include: create date, first page seen, and GX lead indication](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [GrowthX team to manually tag GX-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Looker will read and display data from this sheet](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Data Visualization Requests

  - [Extended historical data view (bar chart limitation fixed)](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Monthly view option in addition to weekly](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Content distribution across cohorts (simple column added to existing table)](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Detailed landing page analysis with impressions, clicks, and position data (to be implemented in overall tab)](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

### Automation Limitations

  - [Direct HubSpot to Looker integration not feasible due to data sampling issues](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Some automation possible through Airtable exports and VLOOKUP formulas in Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Looker unable to perform complex data transformations; pre-processing required](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Reporting Focus

  - [Emphasis on total lead volume and leads from GrowthX-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Monthly reporting becoming more important than weekly for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessalynn to contact Tiro and Webstacks about HubSpot data exports](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Vivek to fix bar chart limitation across all Looker reports](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Vivek to explore adding monthly view option to reports](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Vivek to implement content distribution column in cohorts tab](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Team to consider future enhancements like industry-based lead reporting when volume justifies it](https://fathom.video/share/nPn8QXxPAfKoTvd9FJPGWWxyaxa_1D-L?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
